Petition For Instructions, An Order Validating General Wiseman'S Exeercise Of A Special Power Of Appointment Over The Wiseman Family Trust
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Continued To Jun-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Brillant appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Jon Vaught for General Wiseman (Settlor).

Counsel reported that they have an agreement in principal, that it is a matter of preparing a settlement agreement and performing the agreement, that they need time to deal with financing of the real property, that the settlement agreement should be drafted by the end of next week, that one Beneficiary has not been participating in settlement and that they will need the Court's approval. The Petition for Instructions, etc. is continued to June 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that prior to that point this petition can go off calendar subject to some other agreement. The Parties are to provide a status report.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions, An Order Validating General Wiseman'S Exeercise Of A Special Power Of Appointment Over The Wiseman Family Trust
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erica Cooper for petitoner Jacques Moore by CourtCall; Jon Vaught for Cindy Wong by CourtCall.

The Court inquired regarding prospects for settling the matter. Ms. Cooper stated that Mr. Vaught has been cooperative in providing documents, and stated that she wanted time to pursue further discussions with Mr. Vaught. She requested a 90 day continuance of the hearing. Mr. Vaught concurred in the request. The matter was continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
